title: True North Fleet Services acquires majority stake in Elkhart’s Miles Truck Services

title: Carmel, Fishers top ‘Best Places to Live’ ranking
description:

title: OCRA grant to support home repairs for Vermillion County residents
description: Homeowners in Vermillion County will soon be able to apply for financial assistance to make critical repairs to their homes.  The Indiana Office of Community and Rural Affairs has awarded the county a $495,000 grant

title: Challenger seeks recount of 15-vote loss to Republican Sen. Liz Brown
description: The 15-vote margin between state Sen. Liz Brown and her Republican primary challenger is going to a recount. Challenger Darren Vogt filed a recount petition Tuesday, asking for a review of all ballots cast in the Senate
